chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 233 – Merits of the Ziyarah of Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/311)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/311)

parts.text: عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَرْوَانَ

text: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الثَّالِثِ ( عليه السلام ) أَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ وَ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ وَ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) أَجْمَعِينَ فَكَتَبَ إِلَيَّ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْمُقَدَّمُ وَ هَذَا أَجْمَعُ وَ أَعْظَمُ أَجْراً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Hamdan Al Qalanasy, from Ali Bin Muhammad Al Huzayni, from Ali Bin Abdullah Bin Marwan, from Ibrahim Bin Uqba who said,

‘I wrote to Abu Al-Hassanasws the 3rd asking himasws about Ziyaraat of Abu Abdullah Al-Husaynasws, and about Ziyarah Abu Al-Hassanasws, and Abu Ja’farasws altogether. So heasws wrote to me: ‘Abu Abdullahasws is the foremost and the whole, and this is greater in Recompense’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Hamdan al-Qalanisiy from Ali ibn Muhammad al-Hudayniy from Ali ibn ‘Abd Allah ibn Marwan from Ibrahim ibn ‘Uqbah who has said the following: “I once wrote to abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, the 3rd, asking him about visiting abu ‘Abd Allah, al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and about visiting abu al-Hassan and abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhim al-Salam. He (the Imam) wrote back to me this: ‘Visiting abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has a greater priority and it has more and complete greater rewards.’”
